title: hebe gilliesiana
intro: Hebe gilliesiana, also known as the Western or Southern Hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Hebe gilliesiana has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Hebe gilliesiana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
